## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pipeline review and discussion of ongoing sales processes and operational challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several deals (Monograph, RealReal, Sentinel-1, Udemy) are in advanced stages but facing various hurdles](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Need to implement a structured approach for upsells, renewals, and customer success (QBRs)](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [HubSpot migration is a priority but requires dedicated time from Joe and Bridget](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)
  - [RevOps processes need streamlining, including better prioritization of Joe's tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)

## Topics

### Deal Updates

  - [Monograph: Call scheduled, need to push for commitment and explain strategy sprint process](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [RealReal: Meeting with Sarah (brand lead) on Monday; need to prepare use cases without mentioning Biologica](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Sentinel-1: In final procurement stage; Marcel to follow up with Brian on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Udemy: AI questionnaire to be completed; waiting on procurement to redirect documents](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

### Upsell Opportunities

  - [Identified potential upsells for Superhuman, Galileo, Ramp, and Webstacks from listening tours](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Need to establish process for tracking and executing upsells (co-term vs. early renewal)](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
  - [Considering discounting strategies for early renewals and upfront billing](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

### Customer Success and Renewals

  - [Discussion on implementing Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs) for all customers](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
  - [Debate on whether directors should handle account management or hire dedicated account managers](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)
  - [Urgency to address upcoming renewals, especially those on 3-month terms from August](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)

### Sales Hub Development

  - [Kyle working on refining sales deck and proposal process](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Jason and Bianca developing a personalized sales hub with customer journey, proposal, and potentially embedded contracts](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Need to finalize and implement the sales hub to improve efficiency in sales process](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Operational Challenges

  - [HubSpot migration requires significant time investment from Bridget and Joe](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)
  - [Need to prioritize Joe's tasks and use Linear for better visibility and management of RevOps work](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [Discussion on whether to train existing team on account management or hire experienced professionals](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop process for tracking and executing renewals in CRM](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)

  - [Implement Linear for managing Joe's RevOps tasks and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/ozWx3D_VNsgVaSpbNrmsatgDoZbtoCzk?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
